name: Chicken Packets
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cooked chicken, cream cheese, chives, milk, and salt in a medium bowl (mixing with hands works best) to make filling. Store the filling in a 1-quart freezer bag.
2. Place the crouton crumbs in another 1-quart bag and freeze them along with the chicken filling.
3. Refrigerate the crescent rolls.
4. To prepare for serving, thaw the chicken mixture.
5. Unroll the crescent rolls. Each tube will contain 4 rectangles of dough with a diagonal perforation.
6. Press the dough along each perforation so the rectangle halves will not separate.
7. Place about 1/4 cup of chicken filling into the center of each rectangle.
8. Fold the dough over the filling and pinch the edges to seal tightly.
9. Dip each packet in melted margarine and coat with crouton crumbs.
10. Place the packets on a baking sheet.
11. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Packets are good either hot or cold. Makes 8 packets.
